comment: Cap-rate source registry. Each entry maps a product slug + segment index to a public URL where the current cap rate can be found, plus a parser hint. Sources should be: (1) publicly accessible without login, (2) on the carrier's own domain or SEC EDGAR, (3) refreshed at known cadences. Maintained by K. Add entries here; tools/fetch_cap_rates.py walks this registry.

sources.parser_hint: PDF rate sheet; cap appears as '1-Year S&P 500 ... Cap Rate ... X.XX%' under the Index Advantage+ Income B-share row. The published rate sheet is named M-7188 and updated monthly.
PDF rate sheet; cap under 'Shield Level Pay Plus 6 / S&P 500 / 1-Year / 10% Shield'.
PDF rate sheet; cap under 'SCS Income / S&P 500 / 1-Year / -10% Buffer'. URL is a documented stable redirect; if it 404s, fall back to the SCS Income product page and follow the 'current rates' link.
PDF rate sheet for Lincoln Level Advantage Income B-share; cap appears as a table cell '1-Year / S&P 500 / 10% Buffer / X.XX%'.
Jackson Market Link Pro current rates sheet; look for 'S&P 500 / 1-Year / 10% Buffer / Cap Rate / X.XX%'.
